title: protium surinamense
intro: Protium surinamense, also known as the Brazilian rosewood or Surinam rosewood, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a medicinal plant with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as to support the immune system and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Protium surinamense can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are also used in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues and skin problems.
